description_long: This object is a vintage cathode ray tube (CRT) television with a bulky, deep chassis and a slightly curved glass screen. The front features a dark, thick bezel framing the display, with a faint image of a retro video game visible on the screen. The top and side panels are finished in a woodgrain veneer, adding a classic touch to the otherwise utilitarian black plastic body. The rear of the television is dominated by a protruding section housing the CRT and ventilation grilles, with a power cord extending from the lower back. The base is flat and sturdy, designed to rest on a table or entertainment stand. No visible brand markings or control buttons are apparent from the provided views.
description: A vintage CRT television with a woodgrain top, thick black bezel, and a curved glass screen displaying a retro game. The back is bulky with a protruding section and a visible power cord.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep, boxy profile, woodgrain panel, and power cord extending from the back.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the curved glass screen, thick black bezel, and faint retro game display.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, including the woodgrain panel and ventilation grille.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the protruding CRT housing, ventilation grilles, and the attached power cord.
attribute_bezel_design: Thick, black, matte plastic bezel with a simple, utilitarian design and no visible branding.
